description: Run `JuliaFormatter.jl` against Julia source files
entry:
julia -e '
using Pkg
Pkg.activate(".")
using JuliaFormatter
format(ARGS)
out = Cmd(`git diff --name-only`) |> read |> String
if out == ""
    exit(0)
else
    @error "Some files have been formatted !!!"
    write(stdout, out)
    exit(1)
end'
